titleStmt.title: SII 40.159: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 159. (A.R. No. B. 293 of 1931.) Jūlakallu, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up near the garuḍastaṁbha of the Vishṇu temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1[7]88, Akshaya, Śrāvaṇa śu. 15.

Records that the pillar with the image of Garuḍāḷvār in front of the temple of Vēṇugōpālasvāmi at Juvulakallu in Bellaṁkoṇḍa-sīma, which had been originally set up by Vaṅkāyalapāṭi Rāmaliṅgaya Koṇḍayaṅgāru having rolled down by a flood of rain-water in the year Raktākshi, a new pillar was again set up with an image of Garuḍa by Venkayya, Rāmireḍḍi, Narisireḍḍi and Pullāreḍḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu
1788 Agunēṭi Akṣaya saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa śu 15
lu bellaṁkoṁḍa śīmalō juvulakallu grāmāna śrī
madakhilāṁḍakōṭi braṁhmāṁḍanāyakulaina śrī
vēṇugōpālasvāmivārinannu khānapūrvaṁ kaṁmmavaṁ
śajulaina vēlpūri gōtrōdbhavuluṁnnu vaṁkāyalapā
ṭi rāmaliṁgaya koṁḍayaṁgāru śilāstaṁbhaṁ ya
ttiṁci Aṁdumīda garuḍāḷvārlanu pratiṣṭaceśi nai
vedya dīpārādhanakugānu peda Arakuccala kṣētraṁ sa
marpiṁci jarugutūnnaṁnaṁduku raktākṣi saṁvatsara kā
rtika śu 2 la rōjuna kuriśina bhūrivarṣa vipattuku Ā śilā śāsa
staṁbhamunnu Aṁdumīda vuṁna garuḍāḷvālu
naṁ khilāmaipōyinaṁdnubraṁhmavaṁśajuḍuṁnu ya
ju śśākhādhyāyunudunnukāśikana gōtrōdbhavuḍu
nnutōgarrāti pēraṁbhoṭlagāri pautṛḍunnu Appa
yyagāri putṛḍunnu Aina veṁkkayya . mōṭā
ṭireḍḍi vaṁśīkulunnu boṁtunūḷla gōtrōdbhavuḍuṁnnu
naṁdēla gurvāreḍḍi pautṛḍunnu nariśireḍḍi putṛḍunnu
Ayina rāmireḍḍi pamiḍipāḷla gōtrōdbhavuḍunnu
biravelli pāpireḍḍi pautṛḍunnu nāgireḍḍi putṛḍu
ṁnnu Ayina nariśireḍḍi koṇidenūḷla gōtrōdbhavu
ḍunnumanneṁ puṭṭāreḍḍi pautṛḍunnu caṁnnāreḍḍi putṛ
ḍunnu Ayina pullāreḍḍigārlu samarppiṁcina
dharmaśāsanaṁ . śrī svāmivāri samukhamaṁdu
nūtana śilāstaṁbhaṁ yattiṁci Aṁdu mī
da garuḍāḷvārlanu pratiṣṭacēśi naivēdya dīpārādha
naku pūrvapumānyaṁ ya 11 . 0 naḍustūvunnaṁduna
yippuḍu kārtikamāsa mahōtsavamunaku
ya 3 . 2 lu nūtanamānyaṁ samarppistimi yī
kaiṁkaryaṁ Ācaṁdrārkasthāyigānu vappanagonanava
dariṁcavalenū . maṁggaḷamahā śrī śrīṁjeyunū
dāna pālanayōrmadhyēdānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ
dānātsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .
madvaṁśajāḥ paramahīpati vaṁśajāvāḥ yē bhūmipātsatata mu
jvaladharmacittāḥ . yadharmamēva paripālanamācaraṁtti tatpādukadva
yamahaṁ śirasāvahāmi .
Digital edition of SII 40.159 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
